diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 import timm

 

-def get_model(num_classes=10, pretrained=True, drop_rate=0.0):

-    model = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai', pretrained=pretrained, num_classes=num_classes, drop_rate=drop_rate, drop_path_rate=0.1)

+def get_model(num_classes=10, pretrained=True, drop_rate=0.0, drop_path_rate=0.0):

+    model = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai', pretrained=pretrained, num_classes=num_classes, drop_rate=drop_rate, drop_path_rate=drop_path_rate)

     return model

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@
     test_dataset = TestDataset(args.data_path, transform=transform)

     test_loader = torch.utils.data.DataLoader(test_dataset, batch_size=64, shuffle=False, num_workers=4)

     

-    model = get_model(num_classes=10, pretrained=False, drop_rate=0.0)

+    model = get_model(num_classes=10, pretrained=False, drop_rate=0.0, drop_path_rate=0.0)

     checkpoint = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location='cpu')

     model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])

     model.eval()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -25,11 +25,8 @@
 transform_train = transforms.Compose([

     transforms.RandomResizedCrop(224, scale=(0.7, 1.0)),

     transforms.RandomHorizontalFlip(p=0.5),

-    transforms.RandomRotation(degrees=15),

-    transforms.RandomGrayscale(p=0.1),

-    transforms.RandomApply([transforms.GaussianBlur(kernel_size=3)], p=0.3),

-    transforms.ColorJitter(brightness=0.3, contrast=0.3, saturation=0.3, hue=0.1),

-    transforms.RandAugment(num_ops=2, magnitude=9),

+    transforms.ColorJitter(brightness=0.2, contrast=0.2, saturation=0.2, hue=0.05),

+    transforms.RandAugment(num_ops=2, magnitude=5),

     transforms.ToTensor(),

     transforms.Normalize(mean=mean, std=std),

 ])

@@ -53,13 +50,13 @@
 train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=64, sampler=sampler, num_workers=4, pin_memory=True)

 val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=64, shuffle=False, num_workers=4, pin_memory=True)

 

-model = get_model(num_classes=10, pretrained=True, drop_rate=0.1)

+model = get_model(num_classes=10, pretrained=True, drop_rate=0.2, drop_path_rate=0.2)

 model = model.cuda()

 criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)

-optimizer = optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=2e-5, weight_decay=0.02)

+optimizer = optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=1e-5, weight_decay=0.1)

 

 # Linear warmup + cosine

-num_epochs = 20

+num_epochs = 12

 total_steps = num_epochs * len(train_loader)

 warmup_steps = int(0.1 * total_steps)

 scheduler = optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lambda step: min(1.0, (step + 1) / warmup_steps) if step < warmup_steps else 0.5 * (1 + np.cos(np.pi * (step - warmup_steps) / (total_steps - warmup_steps))))
